objective: Implementar compartición selectiva de recursos del Atlas por personaje en el DM Panel

architecture_snapshot.resource_sharing_flow: DM → broadcastResourceShare() → RTDB parties/{partyId}/resource-share → subscribeToPartyResources() → setSharedResource → App.tsx modal
architecture_snapshot.broadcastResourceShare_current_behavior: Writes viewingCharacterIds: viewingCharacterIds || [] to RTDB (undefined→[] normalización, rompe distinción 'todos' vs 'nadie')
architecture_snapshot.broadcastResourceShare_fix: Solo incluir viewingCharacterIds en payload si !== undefined. Usar ['*'] como sentinela para 'todos'
architecture_snapshot.current_subscription: subscribeToPartyResources callback recibe CampaignResource[], descarta viewingCharacterIds
architecture_snapshot.current_ui: CampaignResources.tsx tiene Reveal/Hide toggle simple, broadcasts a TODOS sin filtro
architecture_snapshot.player_view: App.tsx renderiza SharedResource modal cuando setSharedResource es no-null
architecture_snapshot.party_members_flow: useDMParty(partyId) → DMDashboard → TabContent members prop → CampaignResources (AÚN NO)

design_decisions: SharedResourceEvent NO recibe viewingCharacterIds — es tipo de render, no metadata
broadcastResourceShare omite viewingCharacterIds cuando undefined para distinguir 'todos' vs 'nadie'
subscribeToPartyResources callback cambia a ResourceSharePayload (resource + viewingCharacterIds)
Effect 8 usa useRef + activeCharacter?.id en deps para evitar stale closure (mismo bug de Long Rest)
Filtrado es UX-only, NO es seguridad — documentado explícitamente
Selección de personajes se resetea al cambiar de recurso
